suggestedTopicsLog.note: Released April 8, 2026. Key updates: Product Mapping (capability-based product/service design), Capability & Value Mapping clarifications, Industry Reference Models (9 industries enhanced), Application Portfolio Management (outcome-focused evaluation), BA Knowledgebase (domain definition, governance, metamodel), Tooling Options (streamlined evaluation criteria)

Emerging 'journey ops' function as hybrid role (service design + product thinking + business reporting). Key practitioners: Pfizer, Lloyds, Lufthansa, CHG Healthcare, KPN, EnBW. TheyDo Beyond the Map 2025 conference (Oct 8-10, Barcelona) focused on journey management practice.
Updated domain definitions, governance practices, metamodel views, and tooling guidance (Apr 2026)

Adobe Summit 2026 announced agentic AI for campaigns: synthesizes intelligence from Real-Time CDP, Customer Journey Analytics, Journey Optimizer, builds plans, waits for approval, executes, tracks against goals

suggestedTopicsLog.topic: Journey Orchestration: AI-First & Conversational Journey Monitoring
suggestedTopicsLog.note: 2026 shift toward AI-powered orchestration, conversational journey tracking (beyond owned channels), fallback logic for channel failures, deeper integration with third-party platforms
